input.headline: Ex-Labour MP condemns Starmer as he defects to Green Party

raw.headline: Ex-Labour MP condemns Starmer as he defects to Green Party

winner: Why did the ex-Labour MP switch parties like a chameleon? Because he wanted to blend in with his new leaf mates!

candidates.text: Why did the ex-Labour MP switch parties like a chameleon? Because he wanted to blend in with his new leaf mates!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is concise, uses a pun on 'leaf mates' (a play on 'team mates'), and ties in the political context. However, it's somewhat generic and lacks deeper surprise or specificity."}

candidates.text: Why did the former Labour MP switch from green to red and then back to green? Because he couldn't decide if he was a Starmer or a Leafer!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the wordplay on 'Starmer' and 'Leafer,' but it's a bit forced and lacks specificity about the political context. The pun is clear but not particularly surprising or original."}

candidates.text: Why did the ex-Labour MP switch parties like a chameleon? Because he wanted to join Starmer's green team!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the chameleon and green team pun, but it's a bit generic and lacks specificity. The reference to Starmer's 'green team' is a mild surprise, but the humor could be stronger."}

candidates.text: It seems the ex-Labour MP found a more eco-friendly party... Now they're part of the Green Party.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the play on 'eco-friendly' and 'Green Party,' but it's a bit generic and lacks surprising specificity. The pun is mild and could be more original."}

candidates.text: Why did the ex-Labour MP bring a bag of star maples when he defected to the Green Party? Because he wanted to mark his territory!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 4.5, "reason": "The joke is weak and relies on a forced pun that doesn't clearly connect to the headline. The 'star maples' reference is confusing and lacks specificity or surprise."}
